html:
Exclusive to:

ColdLukewarmWarmHot

“Gains heat when near something hot, and cools near something cold.

It will warm the holder depending on its temperature.

When hot, it mines a bit more efficiently, and does extra damage towards freezing targets.

Durability is used when breaking from cooling down fully, it can be mended back into a functional state by heating it back up again.”

-

The Pyretic Pickaxe is a Tool that can be used to mine Mineable Objects. It can be crafted at an Alchemy Engine using four Twigs, two uncooked Heat Glands, and three Nitre.

The Pyretic Pickaxe has an internal temperature from 0 to 90 degree. When crafted, it starts with 90 degree. Like a Thermal Stone, it can be heated up near heat sources or be cooled down near cool sources. When it is cold or lukewarm, it mines with the same efficiency as normal Pickaxe. When it is Warm, it mines with 25% more efficiency, and when it is Hot, it mines 50% more efficiency.

Stage Temperature Mining Efficiency
Cold ≤ 20 1×
Lukewarm 20–40 1×
Warm 40–60 1.25x
Hot > 60 1.5x

The Pyretic Pickaxe passively heats the holder, like a Thermal Stone, and glows when it is warm or hot. However, the holder also directly gains temperature when mining using the Pickaxe, which can cause Overheating.

The Pyretic Pickaxe does not lose durability from use. Instead, it loses 25% durability when it becomes too cold. When the temperature drops below 0 degree, the Ardent Axe becomes "broken" state and cannot be equipped. It can be repaired by heating it up to above 60 degree before it can be used again.

The Pyretic Pickaxe deals extra damage towards freezing targets, up to double damage towards targets not frozen solid, and triple damage against a target that's frozen solid. As usual, striking a frozen-solid target will instantly thaw them out.

Damage Bonus
Stage Freezing Frozen
Cold / Lukewarm 1× 1×
Warm 1.25× 1.5×
Hot 2× 3×

Trivia

  • The Pyretic Pickaxe was called the "Thermic Pickaxe" during the beta.

Assets

  • Stage 4
  • Stage 3
  • Stage 2
  • Cooled Down
  • Broken
  • Reheating

Exclusive to:
ColdLukewarmWarmHot
“It's cold and brittle.”
–Wilson
“It's not looking so good...”
–Willow
“Is cracking apart.”
–Wolfgang
“It's not long for this world...”
–Wendy
“WARNING: LOSING STRUCTURAL INTEGRITY”
–WX-78
“It may require repairs soon.”
–Wickerbottom
“Looks like it's aboot to break apart.”
–Woodie
“It won't hold together much longer.”
–Maxwell
“It shall nöt weather much further use.”
–Wigfrid
“Uh-oh... is it gonna break?”
–Webber
“It's beginning to crumble.”
–Warly
“Going to break!”
–Wormwood
“It's lookin' a little flimsy.”
–Winona
“The cracks are beginning to show, hyuyu!”
–Wortox
“It gonna break, florp!”
–Wurt
“Uh oh. Looks like it's about to break...”
–Walter
“Its time is nearly up.”
–Wanda
“I think it's losing steam.”
–Wilson
“Awwwww, where did all that beautiful heat go?”
–Willow
“Is cooled off now.”
–Wolfgang
“It has lost the warmth it once had.”
–Wendy
“HEAT OUTPUT: NEGLIGIBLE”
–WX-78
“Its temperature has diminished significantly.”
–Wickerbottom
“Fizzled out, eh?”
–Woodie
“Without heat, it's hardly different from an ordinary pickaxe.”
–Maxwell
“The fire burns löw within it.”
–Wigfrid
“Aww, where did the heat go?”
–Webber
“It's getting cold.”
–Warly
“No more warm?”
–Wormwood
“It's coolin' off.”
–Winona
“What's the harm? It's barely warm!”
–Wortox
“Hey! How come not warm anymore?”
–Wurt
“It's barely warm.”
–Walter
“It's barely warm.”
–Wanda
“It's all warmed up!”
–Wilson
“I'm never using any other pickaxe ever again.”
–Willow
“Is good at keeping Wolfgang nice and warm.”
–Wolfgang
“I can find some small comfort in its warmth.”
–Wendy
“A PICKAXE AND A HEATER. I RESPECT A MULTITASKER”
–WX-78
“It keeps its user comfortably warm while working.”
–Wickerbottom
“It's like wearin' a cozy pair of long johns while I work.”
–Woodie
“If I must do physical labor, I can at least do it in relative comfort.”
–Maxwell
“It öffers respite fröm the cöld.”
–Wigfrid
“It keeps us warm while we do our chores.”
–Webber
“It keeps my hands pleasantly warm.”
–Warly
“Warm pokey”
–Wormwood
“Nothin' warms you up like some hard work.”
–Winona
“It keeps the cold from taking hold.”
–Wortox
“So warm! Gimme!”
–Wurt
“It'll keep me warm while I break rocks!”
–Walter
“It makes the work nice and cozy.”
–Wanda
“It's a hot commodity.”
–Wilson
“I like my tools scalding hot.”
–Willow
“Hot pickaxe make Wolfgang feel the burn!”
–Wolfgang
“The hottest flames burn out the quickest...”
–Wendy
“SUPERHEATED FOR MAXIMUM EFFICIENCY”
–WX-78
“It helps perform tasks quickly, if one can withstand the heat.”
–Wickerbottom
“It's hot, but it gets the job done fast.”
–Woodie
“I despise working up a sweat...”
–Maxwell
“It still bears the heat öf the förge!”
–Wigfrid
“It singes the hairs on our fingies!”
–Webber
“It cuts through stone like a hot knife through butter!”
–Warly
“Ah! Hot!!”
–Wormwood
“Anybody got some safety gloves?”
–Winona
“Its heat can't be beat.”
–Wortox
“It good at breaking rock, but hurt claws!”
–Wurt
“Wow, I can feel the heat from here!”
–Walter
“Incredibly hot, but wonderfully efficient!”
–Wanda

When hot, it mines a bit more efficiently, and does extra damage towards freezing targets.
Durability is used when breaking from cooling down fully, it can be mended back into a functional state by heating it back up again.”

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Cuốc Pyretic là một Công cụ có thể được sử dụng để khai thác các Vật thể có thể khai thác được. Nó có thể được chế tạo tại Máy luyện kim bằng cách sử dụng bốn Cành Cây, hai Tuyến Nhiệt chưa nấu chín và ba Tiêu Nitre.
